Alright, so we are going to dig into the first piece of retention which is going to be reach outs communication, having great communication with your clients. So we are going to cover how to send a jab every 14 days, it's out to your clients just to see if they are responding to you and keep that for members who did not get back to you. We are going to track it all and indicators of someone breaking off communication with us and make even more of an attempt to get in contact with them to make sure everything is going okay or just sending individual texts. So the whole point of this is it's not being too needy, it's literally two messages per month which is not allowed at all but it's showing your clients that you care purposes. If you are promoting and selling great accountability at your gym this would be part of fulfilling that right so you are not going months and months without talking to your members or texting them like the members that you might not see at the gym. There is going to be a whole bunch of members that you see regularly and you talk to regularly and that's great but this is a whole different line of communication and it's interpreted different and it works really well for all the people that you don't talk to. So now that we know why we are sending out these 14 day reach outs let's dig into exactly how we are going to do it. Alright so this is how we are going to run the system and stay super organized. It is pretty simple, it's pretty straightforward. We have our clients broken up into four blocks, A, B, C, D, you can name your blocks maybe after your client or your coaches however you want to do it but each coach would then be responsible for their block of clients. I recommend having them set aside an hour each week to do this and tracking the replies back where it says on that is going to be huge. So here is how you can send them out through a cell phone, you can send them out through Voxer, you can send them however you want one at a time and you just want to make sure that the message is going to be pretty unique to the person, use their first name and I just want to let you know that or just want to see how everything is going, I want to make sure that the program is going good for you. Let me know if there is any questions you need at all, that is what I am here for. As soon as you send that message out to him, you put the date. So now you know what date that message went out and you keep doing that for each one of your clients. So you are tracking the last time that you communicated with them. So you could even if you send them all out at once, you can just copy and paste and this is when all the messages went out. Now when they text you back, maybe you have your coaches three or four days later do another you, but when that person texts back, obviously that is an open line of communication, you want to have your coaches put in the 521, it could all be different 520 texting back. So if you have all these and then this person here did not text back, what we want to do is we want to send another message out to them seven days after per simple. If they still don't get back, you are just going to keep sending them messages every seven days and checking off these boxes until they get back to you. As soon as they get back to you, you will put the date that they text you back which would be like six, I don't know, seventeen and you can uncheck these boxes and reset it basically. These boxes are just here to remind you to text that person back and if you see that they have not text you back, you need to keep sending messages out so you guys stay in communication. Now everybody is getting texted every 14 days so just remember that you probably don't have to send them two texts 14 days out because they are already getting the one that everybody else is and make sure that you keep reaching out. This gap never gets too big so the gap between last text out and last text back that shouldn't be more than like reach out attempts and checking the boxes to give yourself a mental reminder of how long back to you and just the mental reminder that you are still continuing to text. Anytime you check a box, whether it's seven days, fourteen days, twenty one days, just keep updating the list on six twenty one. Now when you log in, you can see, wow, reach out, this person is just not getting back to me. That's an indicator that just by sending text messages through your cell phone or Voxer or however you want to do it and it's a pretty simple tracking system for dates out when they text you back and then if they are not getting back to you, just the mental reminder to yourself or to your trainers, your staff to keep on texting them and then mark this off when you text them so the owner knows that you are trying to talk with this person and then also knows the last time you reached out to them so it's not like it's been a month since you tried to reach out to them too. So that's all we are doing here, phone numbers are listed on the left. Now if you want to see how we can automate this system and we can send text messages out every, and all you have to do is reply to them as they come in, then that is what we are going to go over next. You still have to mark off the last text out and the last text back. That's because we don't, the Scipio doesn't know when you sent the text messages or when they sent them back but the actual messages themselves, we can send those out automatically. So let's dig into that and I can also give you some examples of what the messages should say when we get into the Scipio campaign. So two campaigns called 14 day reach outs and I'll show you why and you can import the campaigns directly into your Scipio. So let's take a look at them. Basically it's a 14 day drip campaign so it sends a message every 14 days and when it gets to the last message after however many segments of 14 days it will automatically loop into the next campaign and it will start the next campaign. And once it gets to all of those 14 day messages it will loop back to the first one and just continually loops back and forth between the two. So it just goes on if we want to start the campaign after 14 days. So it'll wait 14 days and you can pick whatever desired time you want it to go out at and then we are going to have a message in here and this one is pretty simple. You'll need to change the name of the coach but it'll say hey first name, this is your accountability coach and in fact what we'll do is we'll change this for you to where it just says you won't have to change it unless you want to. It will say basically first name it'll say my first name. So my first name. So when you import the campaign they'll all say my first name as well. If the name that you have registered on your Scipio account is not the same name that you want on the text message then make sure you change it. And it says hope you're killing it at the gym, keep working out hard, your body thanks you. Anything I can help with so it's just a jab. There's no ask, there's nothing like that, it's just what can I help with. So that message will go out and then we will wait 14 more days and then another message will go out and it'll say hey I hope everything is going great, I wanted to send a quick reminder about the portal which is an awesome reason. So that's going out 14 days later. We don't keep saying our name over and over again, that keeps saying your name and then we send out another one and this one waits 14 days. And it says hey it's your coach again, how's the experience going at the gym, anything we can do to make it better. Now when it gets all the way to the bottom what it will do is there's a rule at the bottom and it says execute messages sent, add the contact to another campaign and it's called 14 day reachouts. Copy. Go into 14 day reachouts, copy. Here we are and it basically says check in and again it starts 14 days later and it will begin sending it all out again. Different messages, they're all different, you can keep customizing them so we have 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 5 in here. Basically 26, that's half a year's worth of messages if I did the math right. If you do want to change them up after 6 months make them all brand new again. Change all the wording on them and then at the end of this last message again there's one rule to it and it says basically when the message is sent add it back to the other campaign that's 14 day reachouts which is the first one we went over. So basically it will send out those 5 messages 14 days apart, loop them back into the other campaign, do it again, loop them back in and just keeps on going. So that's how to do it if you want to automate this to send the messages every 14 days but the whole point of this is accountability. Don't forget to send these out every 14 days and if somebody doesn't get back to you within so hopefully this makes a lot of sense and you're just going to do this for each one of your trainers. So you'll have different clients basically that they're working with but each one of them is responsible for every 14 days sending messages out to their clients and they can just do maybe an hour accountability block where they message all of their clients at once and as the messages come back in they maybe have another an hour accountability block maybe 3 days later where they put in the dates for all the text messages that came back and by then they'll know if nobody got back to them after 7 days they'll know if it's been a week and no one's got back to them that's when they start reaching back out to the people that haven't got back to them knowing that 7 days after that an automatic one or another manual one is going to go out. So hopefully that makes sense and you guys are able to do this horseman of retention and absolutely crush it.
